title: Path of Exile 2 players broke the game by summoning 2,000 skeletons and then lured unsuspecting players into the ultimate frame rate shredder
summary: A literal minion army.
body: Most players eventually lose the drive to keep grinding a new league, or season, in Path of Exile 2 and simply log off until the next one. Others gather up all their in-game money and spend it on something ridiculous, like an army of 2,000 skeletons. PoE 2 streamer Empyriangaming decided it was time to test the action RPG's limits by creating the most expensive minion builds I've ever seen. We're talking gear that cost him more in-game currency than I've earned over the course of my 700 hours in the game. There's min-maxing and then there's whatever Empyriangaming did to make six complete sets of gear to summon more minions than the game can even handle. Normally, a minion build has around 10 to 15 skeletons accompanying them in PoE 2, but Empyriangaming's crew did some math to figure out how to squeeze out as many of them as possible. The trick is to reduce the resource cost of each minion into single digits and to stack up as much of that resource as you can. Unfortunately, the game refuses to let you summon more than 255 of each minion type before deleting them all and resetting the counter back to zero, so Empyriangaming recruited some friends to bring their own armies. The gr…

title: Xbox's new VP of engineering quits just 2 months after taking the job
summary: Jared Palmer, who was picked to work directly with CEO Asha Sharma on the division's "most complex" problems, has taken a role at AI company Cognition.
body: Just two months after he was appointed the new vice president of engineering at Xbox and technical advisor to CEO Asha Sharma, Jared Palmer is now the former vice president of engineering at Xbox and technical advisor to CEO Asha Sharma. In an update to his LinkedIn profile , Palmer said he's joined AI company Cognition to serve as its vice president of engineering instead. "I’m grateful to Asha and everyone at Microsoft and Xbox for an amazing year," Palmer wrote in a very to-the-point missive. "Excited for this next chapter." "Cognition operates Devin, the first autonomous software engineer," the company's website says, in case you were wondering what it actually does. "Devin plans, writes, tests, and ships production code on its own, working inside your codebase and the tools your team already uses." AI is definitely Palmer's thing: Prior to his brief tenure at Xbox, he was vice president of product at Microsoft's CoreAI division, which Sharma headed up before taking the reins at Xbox. That was a fairly short spin too, lasting just eight months; before that he spent roughly four years as the vice president of AI at AI infrastructure company Vercel. Sharma said when Palmer was a…

title: Marathon's experimental PvE mode is live, immediately tripling its daily player count
summary: Cryo Archive is open for all, for a limited time.
body: Today, Bungie launched Marathon's 1.1.5 update, featuring its awaited Vault Breaker experimental PvE mode which offers a two-week window for players to contend with the typically-endgame Cryo Archive map and its many hazards and puzzles without any twitchy, murderous squads of competing players hanging around. Shortly after the Vault Breaker update went live, SteamDB charts showed that Marathon's concurrent player count had jumped to over 14,800 players. That's not a massive number compared to its peers on Steam's Most Played ranking , but it's roughly triple the activity that Marathon pulled at similar times of day throughout the last week—and the most concurrent player activity since player numbers started bleeding after the June free weekend. Vault Breaker trades Marathon's typical extraction loop for an alternative progression scheme. Unlike in normal excursions, runners in Vault Breaker won't keep any gear they pick up and extract with during a run. Instead, the goal is to loot Vault Data that can be used for persistent upgrades to your initial Vault Breaker kit or spent on gear that can be carried into standard runs, offering a more roguelite framework for Bungie's gunplay. …

title: Hasbro takes $56 million hit over multiple game cancellations, but it's still talking about how Baldur's Gate 3 is key to its future success
summary: Just a few years after going big on videogames, Hasbro is pulling an Xbox by narrowing its focus on its biggest brands and franchises.
body: Two years after boasting about how hard it was going on videogames, Hasbro has recorded a "$56 million non-cash impairment" in its second-quarter financial report , arising from the cancellation of several games in development that were expected to release "in 2028 and beyond." First things first: As PC Gamer's Joshua Wolens explained when Sony took a staggering $766 million impairment against Bungie, that $56 million figure isn't a direct loss. Rather, it's an unexpected decrease in value of an asset compared to its book value, separate from standard depreciation. Just a few years ago, inspired by the massive success of Baldur's Gate 3, Hasbro was going hard on videogames. In 2022 it had a half-dozen game studios working on different projects in its stable; two years later Dan Ayoub, head of digital product development at Hasbro-owned Wizards of the Coast, put a number on that effort, saying "we've got over $1 billion in games right now being developed," and adding that "videogames are an integral part of Hasbro's strategy going into the next 100 years." But it hasn't gone especially smoothly since then. A big-budget GI Joe game announced in 2021 is in trouble, and the deal for a…

title: خلف الكواليس.. لقجع يتحرك نحو خطوة مفصلية
summary: الرجل الذي غيّر وجه الكرة المغربية على أعتاب منصب جديد
body: الرجل الذي غيّر وجه الكرة المغربية على أعتاب منصب جديد كشفت تقارير صحفية مغربية أن فوزي لقجع، الوزير المنتدب المكلف بالميزانية ورئيس الجامعة الملكية المغربية لكرة القدم، يستعد لاتخاذ خطوة جديدة في مسيرته، من خلال الانضمام رسميًا إلى حزب الأصالة والمعاصرة، قبل أسابيع من الانتخابات التشريعية المرتقبة. وبحسب مصادر شبكة le360 ، فإن الإعلان الرسمي عن انضمام لقجع من المنتظر أن يتم خلال اجتماع المجلس الوطني لحزب الأصالة والمعاصرة، السبت المقبل، بعد أشهر من انتشار أنباء بشأن اقترابه من الالتحاق بالحزب. وأوضح التقرير أن انضمام لقجع إلى المجلس الوطني سيمهد تلقائيًا لدخوله المكتب السياسي لحزب الأصالة والمعاصرة، باعتباره عضوًا في الحكومة، وذلك وفقًا للنظام الأساسي، ليصبح جزءًا من أعلى هيئة تنفيذية داخل الحزب. اقرأ أيضًا: عكس المتوقع.. تسريب معلومات جديدة حول قرار "كاس" في قضية المغرب والسنغال ولم تكشف le360 ما إذا كان المنصب الجديد سيؤثر على مستقبل لقجع كرئيس للجامعة الملكية المغربية لكرة القدم (الاتحاد المغربي للعبة). ويُنظر إلى لقجع باعتباره أحد أبرز الوجوه الحكومية في المغرب، نظرًا لدوره في إدارة ملفات الميزانية، إلى جانب إشرافه على قطاع كرة القدم من خلال رئاسته للجامعة الملكية المغربية، وهو ما يمنحه ثقلًا سياسيًا وإداريًا كبيرًا.

title: أسرع من المتوقع.. رودريجو يفاجئ ريال مدريد
summary: موعد محتمل لعودة النجم البرازيلي
body: موعد محتمل لعودة النجم البرازيلي يقترب البرازيلي رودريجو من تلقي دفعة معنوية كبيرة في رحلة تعافيه مع ريال مدريد، بعدما أظهرت الفحوصات وبرنامج التأهيل تقدما أسرع من المتوقع، ما يعزز آمال النادي في استعادته خلال النصف الثاني من الموسم. كشفت صحيفة AS  الإسبانية أن ريال مدريد بات أكثر تفاؤلا بشأن تعافي مهاجمه البرازيلي رودريجو، إذ ظهرت مؤشرات على إمكانية عودته في يناير المقبل، أي قبل الموعد الذي كان متوقعا عند تعرضه للإصابة. وكان رودريجو قد تعرض في الثاني من مارس الماضي لإصابة قوية خلال مواجهة خيتافي، تمثلت في تمزق بالرباط الصليبي الأمامي والغضروف الهلالي الخارجي في ركبته اليمنى، وهي الإصابة التي أنهت موسمه وحرمته أيضا من المشاركة مع منتخب البرازيل في كأس العالم 2026، الذي ودعه "السيليساو" من دور الـ16. وبحسب التقرير، فإن اللاعب البالغ من العمر 25 عاما يسير بخطوات متقدمة في برنامجه العلاجي، إذ أصبح أقرب إلى التعافي خلال عشرة أشهر بدلا من الاثني عشر شهرا التي قُدرت في التشخيص الأولي. اقرأ أيضا: لم يكتف بإحراجه في المونديال.. مبابي يفتح جبهة جديدة مع ميسي وخضع رودريجو لعملية جراحية في 10 مارس، قبل أن يبدأ برنامجا مكثفا من العلاج الطبيعي والتأهيل، ركز على استعادة حركة الركبة والحفاظ على جاهزيته البدنية داخل صالة الألعاب الرياضية. وأضافت الصحيفة أن اللاعب أصبح يسير بصورة طبيعية منذ ع…

summary: النجم الإنجليزي يختار البلوز على حساب الجانرز
body: النجم الإنجليزي يختار البلوز على حساب الجانرز بدأ النجم الإنجليزي مورجان روجرز الحرب مبكرًا مع جماهير آرسنال، بعد انضمامه رسميًا، لصفوف تشيلسي، قادمًا من أستون فيلا، مساء اليوم الثلاثاء. وذكر نادي تشيلسي عبر موقعه الرسمي، أن روجرز البالغ من العمر 23 عامًا وقّع عقدًا يبقيه داخل قلعة ستامفورد بريدج حتى عام 2033 ، وسينضم إلى تشكيلة المدرب تشابي ألونسو قبل الموسم الجديد. وأشارت العديد من وسائل الإعلام الإنجليزية، إلى أن صفقة روجرز كلفت خزائن تشيلسي 117 مليون جنيه إسترليني (138 مليون يورو)، ليصبح ثاني أغلى صفقة في البريميرليج، بعد انتقال ألكسندر إيزاك الصيف الماضي من نيوكاسل إلى ليفربول مقابل 125 مليون جنيه إسترليني. وكان آرسنال أبرز المهتمين بخدمات روجرز وحاول ضمه خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية الحالية، قبل أن يتدخل تشيلسي ويحسم الصفقة لصالحه. وفي أول تعليق له بعد انضمامه لكتيبة البلوز، قال روجرز عبر الموقع الرسمي لنادي تشيلسي : "أنا متحمس للغاية. بالنسبة لي، تشيلسي هو أكبر نادٍ في لندن، لطالما أعجبت به منذ أن كنت طفلاً". وتدور العديد من المناوشات بين جماهير ناديي آرسنال وتشيلسي، حول النادي الأكبر داخل العاصمة الإنجليزية لندن، لذا فقد اعتبر البعض أن جملة روجرز قد تستفز العديد من جماهير الجانرز. وأضاف روجرز: "أنا متحمس للغاية للمشروع مع المدرب الجديد، واللاعبين الذين لدينا، والوجهة التي …

summary: تكريم غير مألوف لجافي وفابيان رويز بعد الفوز بكأس العالم

title: بالفيديو.. أميرة إسبانيا تحرج توريس بسؤال غير متوقع
summary: وعد فيران توريس يعود للواجهة
body: وعد فيران توريس يعود للواجهة أثبتت الأميرة ليونور، ابنة الملك فيليبي السادس وليّة عهد إسبانيا، متابعتها الدقيقة لكل التفاصيل والوعود الكروية، بعدما ظهرت في حوار طريف وعفوي مع مهاجم المنتخب الإسباني فيران توريس خلال مراسم الاستقبال الملكي للأبطال. ويأتي ذلك الاستقبال بعد تتويج المنتخب الإسباني بلقب كأس العالم للمرة الثانية في تاريخه، عقب التغلب مساء يوم الأحد الماضي على الأرجنتين بهدف دون رد من توقيع توريس نفسه . ولم تزل أصداء الاحتفالات باللقب المونديالي الثاني تسود الشارع الإسباني؛ حيث جاب لاعبو "لا روخا" شوارع العاصمة مدريد، واضعين حدًا للاحتفالات بالمحطات الرسمية المعتادة في قصر "ثارثويلا" الملكي ومقر الحكومة في "المونكلوا". ومن بين اللحظات الكثيرة التي وثقتها الكاميرات، خطفت لفتة جمعت بين العائلة المالكة وصاحب هدف الفوز الحاسم في المباراة النهائية ضد الأرجنتين الأنظار على منصات التواصل الاجتماعي. وعقب تداول مقطع الفيديو بشكل واسع، تساءل المتابعون عما دار بين الأميرة الشابة ومهاجم برشلونة خلال السلام الملكي ؛ وبينما ذهبت بعض التكهنات الساخرة إلى توجيهها إطراءً للاعب، كشفت التسجيلات الصوتية المكررة أن الأميرة ليونور بادرت توريس بالقول: "ألم تكن تنوي حلاقة شعرك بالكامل؟"، ليرد عليها المهاجم سريعًا وبابتسامة: "لا، لا!"، وذلك بحسب ما نقلت صحيفة " ماركا " الإسبانية. pic.twitter.com/…

title: The best farm sims and games like Stardew Valley
summary: Games like Stardew Valley have fully taken root on PC, so now we're thoroughly spoiled for choice on new games to plant parsnips in.
body: The best games like Stardew Valley (Image credit: NPC Studio, composite by PC Gamer) Fields of Mistria Why : The level of heart and detail in the character dialogue is unmatched. Fields of Mistria ❤️ Romance : Yes ⚔️ Combat : Yes 🤝 Co-op : No After two years of early access and an imminent 1.0 launch, Fields of Mistria has become my absolute favorite in the post-Stardew farm sim scene. It solves so many of my little farm simming gripes with little quality-of-life touches and just feels like it was made with a deep love of the genre. Mistria commits so hard to the '90s anime and Game Boy Advance aesthetic with pastel colors and a bunch of loveable cuties wearing capes and shoulder pads. I can't stress enough that it's got so much substance underneath that anime trope crust, though. Yes March is a textbook tsundere and Juniper is a witch who says "OH HO HO" with that arrogant hand pose when she laughs, but it leaves room for characters who defy stereotypes too. Mistria has so much detailed, character-building dialogue that I truly love getting to know its characters and their quirks. title: العرض الأخير؟.. برشلونة يضاعف رهانة على ألفاريز للحد الأقصى
summary: مهلة نهائية.. الفريق الكتالوني يحسم خطوته التالية
body: مهلة نهائية.. الفريق الكتالوني يحسم خطوته التالية كشف تقرير صحفي عن نية برشلونة تجاه التعقيدات التي يفرضها نادي أتلتيكو مدريد خلال المفاوضات لضم المهاجم الأرجنتيني جوليان ألفاريز. وبعد رحيل روبرت ليفاندوفسكي رسميا عن الفريق الكتالوني بنهاية الموسم الماضي، لا يزال برشلونة يبحث عن اسم لامع يليق بملء المكان الذي تركه النجم البولندي. وقدم نادي برشلونة بالفعل عرضا مبدئيا بقيمة 100 مليون يورو، وقد أوضح رئيس النادي خوان لابورتا أن هذا العرض لن يبقى مطروحا إلى أجل غير مسمى. ومع ذلك، لا يزال أتلتيكو مدريد مصمما على الاحتفاظ باللاعب الدولي الأرجنتيني على الرغم من رغبة اللاعب المعلنة في الرحيل. ورفض الرئيس التنفيذي لأتلتيكو مدريد، ميجيل أنخيل جيل مارين، مؤخرا أي تلميح إلى أن النادي قد يغير موقفه، مشددا: "لم نقبل عرض الـ 100 مليون يورو، ولن نقبل عرض الـ 150 مليون يورو أو الـ 200 مليون يورو". وكشف سانتي أوفالي في برنامج "إل لارجويرو" على إذاعة كادينا سير، عن الخطوات التالية للنادي الكتالوني: "سيقدم نادي برشلونة عرضًا جديدًا، وإن لم يكن ذلك قريبًا. إنه عرضٌ يتراوح بين 120 و130 مليونًا، لأنهم لم يرغبوا في الوصول إلى مبلغ 150 مليونًا الذي عرضه ريال مدريد في أي وقتٍ مضى". 🗣️🗯️ LA RESPUESTA DEL BARÇA 🔵🔴 AL COMUNICADO DEL GIL MARÍN 💰 El @FCBarcelona hará una nueva oferta y no será a corto plazo…

title: ثاني أغلى صفقة بالبريميرليج.. تشيلسي يعلن ضم روجرز رسميًا
summary: البلوز يتفوقون على آرسنال في صفقة النجم الإنجليزي الشاب
body: البلوز يتفوقون على آرسنال في صفقة النجم الإنجليزي الشاب أعلن نادي تشيلسي، مساء اليوم الثلاثاء، تعاقده رسميًا مع الإنجليزي الدولي مورجان روجرز، قادمًا من أستون فيلا، لدعم صفوف البلوز في المرحلة المقبلة. وذكر نادي تشيلسي عبر موقعه الرسمي ، أن روجرز البالغ من العمر 23 عامًا وقّع عقدًا يبقيه داخل قلعة ستامفورد بريدج حتى عام 2033، وسينضم إلى تشكيلة المدرب تشابي ألونسو قبل الموسم الجديد. ينضم روجرز إلى تشيلسي بعد أن رسخ نفسه كواحد من أبرز المواهب الهجومية الشابة في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز. خلال فترة وجوده في أستون فيلا، ساهمت أهدافه وتمريراته الحاسمة في تسجيل 40 هدفًا في 85 مباراة بالدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز، ليقود الفيلانز إلى احتلال المركز الرابع بالبريميرليج، قبل رفع كأس الدوري الأوروبي في الموسم الماضي. منذ ظهوره الأول مع المنتخب الإنجليزي الأول في نوفمبر/تشرين الثاني 2024، أصبح روجرز لاعبًا أساسيًا في صفوف منتخب الأسود الثلاثة، حيث شارك في 22 مباراة دولية ومثل بلاده في كأس العالم 2026، الذي أنهاه منتخب إنجلترا في المركز الثالث. وذكرت العديد من وسائل الإعلام الإنجليزية، أن صفقة روجرز كلفت خزائن تشيلسي 117 مليون يورو (138 مليون يورو)، ليصبح ثاني أغلى صفقة في البريميرليج، بعد انتقال ألكسندر إيزاك الصيف الماضي من نيوكاسل إلى ليفربول مقابل 125 مليون جنيه إسترليني. يشار إلى أن آرسنال كان …

title: ضحية اعتداء النهائي.. تصريح مفاجئ من جافي عن معاقبة لاعبي الأرجنتين
summary: لاعب الوسط الإسباني يقلل من الجدل حول أحداث ما بعد نهائي كأس العالم
body: لاعب الوسط الإسباني يقلل من الجدل حول أحداث ما بعد نهائي كأس العالم قلّل جافي، لاعب وسط منتخب إسبانيا، من الجدل المثار بشأن الأحداث التي أعقبت نهائي كأس العالم أمام الأرجنتين، مؤكدًا أنه لا يرى ضرورة لمعاقبة لاعبي "التانجو" بالإيقاف، رغم الاشتباكات التي شهدتها المباراة الختامية. وجاءت تصريحات نجم برشلونة خلال حفل تكريم أُقيم له ولزميله فابيان رويز في مسقط رأسيهما، مدينة لوس بالاثيوس إي فيافرانكا، بعد أيام من تتويجهما بلقب كأس العالم مع المنتخب الإسباني. وكان جافي أحد أطراف المشادة التي اندلعت عقب صافرة النهاية في ملعب نيويورك، بعدما تدخل للدفاع عن أحد زملائه، قبل أن يتعرض للدفع والإطاحة أرضًا من جانب لاعب الوسط الأرجنتيني لياندرو باريديس. ورغم تلك الواقعة، رفض الدولي الإسباني المطالبة بعقوبات إضافية ضد لاعبي الأرجنتين، وقال: "إذا كنت صادقًا، فأنا لا أعتقد أنهم يجب أن يُعاقبوا بالإيقاف". وأضاف، في تصريحات نشرتها صحيفة " ماركا " الإسبانية، اليوم الثلاثاء، "أتفهم أن ما حدث لا يقدم صورة جيدة للأطفال، لكن كرة القدم تتضمن أيضًا جانبًا من الاحتكاك والعنف. بالنسبة لي، كان من الطبيعي أن يُطرد اللاعب خلال المباراة، لكن في النهاية أرى أن هذه الأمور جزء من كرة القدم". 💣🇦🇷 GAVI SOBRE LA AGRESIÓN QUE RECIBIÓ DE PAREDES EN LA FINAL ESPAÑA-ARGENTINA: 💥 “No creo que deba ser suspendido. title: A new friendslop game is already Steam's 12th-most wishlisted game a mere week after it was announced
summary: The takeoff hasn't been without some turbulence, however.
body: About once a week I head on over Steam to peek at the most wishlisted games because I want to know: what are PC gamers looking forward to most? Are there any highly anticipated games on the brink of release? And is anything new blowing up This week I definitely spotted something new: Dear Passengers, a co-op game about running "the world's worst airline" with your friends, is now seated comfortably at number 12 on Steam's top wishlists . That's impressive because the chaotic friendslop game was only announced a week ago. Here's the trailer if you missed it: "You and your friends are the crew," says developer Flexus. "Your job is to deliver passengers and cargo to their destination. Preferably in one piece. While one of you pilots the plane, the others keep the cabin together, serve the passengers, and deal with whatever goes wrong before it gets much worse." And things definitely look like they get worse. Turbulence, bad weather, bird strikes, and dangerous cargo can lead to all sorts of disasters while in flight, and of course there's no greater threat than your friends who might open the doors at altitude and get everyone sucked out of the plane. title: For the first time, Unity demonstrates 'an Unreal character running through a Unity world'
summary: "Connect ALL the engines!" exclaims Epic CEO Tim Sweeney.
body: Unity has demonstrated a Unity Engine game running inside of an Unreal Engine game, marking a step in the direction of Epic Games CEO Tim Sweeney's vision for an interconnected gaming ecosystem. The demonstration took place this week at the Unite Seoul keynote, where Unity also announced the next version of its game engine. Unity's goal with the project, in partnership with Epic, is to allow Unity developers to publish their games in Fortnite. "You will see, for the first time, a Unity game rendering natively inside Unreal Engine," said Unity senior director of technical product management James Stone as he launched the demo. "Now this is not live in Fortnite yet, but it shows what's possible for a shared foundation. "What you're seeing here is a game simulated in Unity, rendered with Unreal. Now, that's not video streamed, there's no smoke and mirrors. This is all real time. But it's not just rendering. Watch the avatar. That's an Unreal character running through a Unity world. That's physics, lighting, input: all of it synchronized between engines." Last year we announced a partnership with Epic Games to bring Unity to Fortnite - and today, we want to show you where we are.This …

title: دي ماريا أم ميسي.. من هو البطل الحقيقي لأمجاد الأرجنتين؟
summary: الأرقام تشعل الجدل
body: الأرقام تشعل الجدل أعاد سقوط الأرجنتين أمام إسبانيا في نهائي كأس العالم 2026 إلى الواجهة سؤالا ظل مؤجلا منذ اعتزال أنخيل دي ماريا اللعب الدولي قبل عامين: هل افتقد منتخب ليونيل سكالوني البطل الحقيقي لراقصي التانجو المواعيد الكبرى؟ بعد الهزيمة بهدف سجله فيران توريس في الدقيقة 106 من الوقت الإضافي، برزت سلسلة من الأرقام التي تربط بين حضور دي ماريا في النهائيات الكبرى ونتائج المنتخب، لتفتح مجددا نقاشا قديما حول تأثيره في أكبر المواعيد رقميا وعلى الصعيد التكتيكي أيضا. محاولة أخيرة لم تنجح قبل أشهر من انطلاق كأس العالم، طلب عدد من لاعبي المنتخب الأرجنتيني من دي ماريا التراجع عن قرار الاعتزال والمشاركة في البطولة، إلا أن اللاعب تمسك بموقفه. وعندما أعلن المنتخب الأرجنتيني قائمته الأولية في مايو 2026، غاب اسم الجناح المخضرم بصورة نهائية. وكشف المدرب ليونيل سكالوني لاحقا أن الجهاز الفني حاول إقناع دي ماريا بالعودة، حتى لو لخوض مباراة وداع أمام الجماهير، لكنه رفض ذلك. ونقلت صحيفة AS الإسبانية عن سكالوني قوله: "طلبنا منه أن يأتي ليودع جماهيره. لقد رحل، ولا توجد طريقة لإقناعه. حاولنا، لكن قراره نهائي". وأضاف: "اعتزل وهو فائز، وواحد من أفضل لاعبي كرة القدم في تاريخنا". اقرأ أيضا: وكيل نجم إنتر عن اهتمام الهلال: سأفكر بهذه الطريقة لو كنت مكانه نهائي 2026... أرقام غير مسبوقة  ترك النهائي أما…

title: Palworld players have harnessed the power of selective breeding to create 'infinite bomb' Pals that can blow themselves up, repeatedly, forever
summary: Is that good?
body: Palworld, as our breeding guide shows, lets you accomplish some wild things by playing matchmaker for your creatures. You can gain early access to late-game Pals, spawn variant subspecies, and—as players have recently discovered—breed a genetic monstrosity that can repeatedly blow itself up in combat without taking any damage in the process. title: انهار بالبكاء مجددًا.. اعتراف صريح من سكالوني بشأن نهائي المونديال
summary: جماهير الأرجنتين تهتف باسم سكالوني.. والمدرب يرفض حسم مستقبله
body: جماهير الأرجنتين تهتف باسم سكالوني.. والمدرب يرفض حسم مستقبله انهار ليونيل سكالوني، المدير الفني لمنتخب الأرجنتين، بالبكاء مجددًا خلال استقباله في مسقط رأسه بمدينة بوجاتو، عقب العودة من كأس العالم 2026، مؤكدًا أن خسارة النهائي أمام إسبانيا لا تزال تمثل لحظة مؤلمة، وذلك بعدما نزلت دموعه أيضًا في المؤتمر الصحفي الذي أعقب المباراة النهائية. وحظي سكالوني باستقبال جماهيري كبير في المدينة الواقعة بمقاطعة سانتا في، حيث احتشد المئات لتحيته، إلا أن مدرب "التانجو" لم يتمالك دموعه وهو يتحدث عن خسارة اللقب. وقال سكالوني، فيما أبرزته صحيفة " آس " الإسبانية اليوم الثلاثاء: "لم ننجح في الفوز. نحن نعلم أننا نلعب من أجل إسعاد شعبنا، ولهذا السبب يكون الألم كبيرًا". "Hasta diciembre estoy. title: الصفقة تقترب.. لابورت يوافق على الانضمام لبرشلونة
summary: المقربون من المدافع الإسباني أبلغوا رئيس برشلونة برغبته
body: المقربون من المدافع الإسباني أبلغوا رئيس برشلونة برغبته وافق إيمريك لابورت مدافع أتلتيك بيلباو، على خطوة الانضمام لصفوف برشلونة، خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية الحالية، لدعم النادي الكتالوني على مستوى الخط الخلفي. وتألق لابورت بصورة واضحة مع منتخب إسبانيا في كأس العالم 2026 ، وكان ضمن أسباب تتويج الماتادور باللقب العالمي الثاني. هذا التألق دفع النادي الكتالوني للتحرك من أجل جذب لابورت (32 عامًا) لصفوف البارسا. وأفادت العديد من وسائل الإعلام الإسبانية، اليوم الثلاثاء، أن برشلونة لن يحتاج للتفاوض مع أتلتيك بلباو، في ظل وجود شرط جزائي في عقد لابورت يبلغ 15 مليون يورو فقط. وأشارت قناة " Esport3 " الكتالونية، إلى أن لابورت مهتم بالفعل بالانتقال إلى برشلونة في الموسم الجديد. وأضافت أن المقربين من لابورت كشفوا لخوان لابورتا رئيس برشلونة، موافقة اللاعب على الانضمام إلى البلوجرانا هذا الصيف.

title: استثناء خاص.. إيطاليا مستعدة للتضحية من أجل جوارديولا
summary: الاتحاد الإيطالي يكسر قواعده من أجل جوارديولا
body: الاتحاد الإيطالي يكسر قواعده من أجل جوارديولا أكد جيوفاني مالاجو، رئيس الاتحاد الإيطالي لكرة القدم، أن الراتب المقترح للمدرب الإسباني بيب جوارديولا لتولي قيادة "الأزوري" سيشكل استثناءً ماليًا لميزانية الاتحاد ، مشددًا في الوقت ذاته على أن حسم الصفقة لا يزال غير مضمون. وتأتي هذه التصريحات بعد أن ضجت وسائل الإعلام خلال الـ48 ساعة الماضية بأخبار سفر المدير التقني للمنتخب الإيطالي باولو مالديني ومستشاره الخاص ليوناردو إلى برشلونة  لعقد سلسلة من المحادثات المكثفة مع جوارديولا خلال العطلة الأسبوعية. وتسعى الإدارة الفنية الجديدة للمنتخب الإيطالي بشكل جاد لإقناع المدير الفني السابق لمانشستر سيتي بقيادة المشروع الجديد للأزوري. ورغم أن تكلفة راتب المدرب الإسباني كانت تُعد حائلًا دون إتمام الصفقة، إلا أن تصريحات مالاجو فتحت الباب أمام هذا الاحتمال؛ حيث قال في تصريحات نقلها موقع " فوتبول إيطاليا ": "هناك جوانب مالية مؤكدة يجب أخذها بعين الاعتبار، والقول بإننا سنضطر للضغط على أنفسنا ماليًا لتغطيتها هو تهوين من الواقع". وأضاف مالاجو متطرقًا لاسم المدرب الإسباني: "هناك بعض الاستثناءات التي يمكن إقرارها، وهي الاستثناءات المتعلقة بالاسم الذي يثير كل هذا الجدل في الوقت الحالي: بيب جوارديولا. لست بحاجة لشرح الأسباب البديهية التي تجعله استثناءً، لكن هذا لا يعني وجود أي ضمانات لإتمام الأمر". ويرى…

title: تفوق على لايبزيج.. نادٍ إسباني يعلن أولى صفقات النصر الصيفية
summary: "العالمي" يفتتح الميركاتو الصيفي
body: "العالمي" يفتتح الميركاتو الصيفي كشف نادٍ إسباني عن أولى صفقات نادي النصر خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية المقبلة، قبل أن يعلن النادي السعودي نفسه. ونقلت صحيفة "الرياضية" السعودية تصريحات لهيكتور مارتن، المسؤول الإعلامي في نادي ريال مايوركا، أعلن من خلالها انتقال لاعب وسطه البرتغالي سامو كوستا إلى صفوف النصر. وقال مارتن: "الصفقة حُسِمَت بين مايوركا والنصر، وتمَّ التوصُّل إلى اتفاقٍ نهائي بينهما بشأن انتقال سامو كوستا، بعد تفوُّق النادي السعودي على عرض لايبزيج الألماني وعروض أوروبية أخرى". وبحسب ما كشفت عنه صحيفة "عكاظ" السعودية في وقت سابق، فإن النصر اتفق على ضم لاعب الوسط البرتغالي، مقابل 9 ملايين يورو، يتم دفعها على مرحلتين، وهو ما يُعتبر مبلغًا زهيدًا. وبذلك سيكون سامو كوستا أول صفقة يبرمها نادي النصر خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية، حيث لم يتعاقد مع أي لاعب حتى الآن بسبب الأزمة المالية التي يعاني منها. ويمتلك سامو كوستا مسيرة مميزة، قضى معظمها في إسبانيا، حيث لعب لصالح ألميريا بين عامي 2020 و2023، قبل الانتقال إلى ريال مايوركا الذي يلعب له حتى الوقت الراهن. على المستوى الدولي، بدأ كوستا رحلته مع منتخب البرتغال رفقة كريستيانو رونالدو منذ أكتوبر/تشرين الأول 2024، ولكنه لم يشارك معه سوى في 7 مباريات. وتم استدعاء صاحب الـ25 عامًا للمشاركة مع البرتغال في بطولة كأس العالم 2026 بأمريكا وكن…

title: Splitgate studio 1047 Games is laying off more people just a month after releasing its latest game
summary: Multiple employees say they've been let go in a new round of cuts.
body: A little less than a month after the release of its Titanfall-inspired shooter Empulse, developer 1047 Games has reportedly laid off more employees. While the studio hasn't made a formal announcement of the cuts, multiple employees on LinkedIn (via Game Developer ) have said they've been let go in what one described as "the third wave of studio layoffs." Reports of layoffs at 1047 began to surface last week. "A bunch of us, 'the crew' aboard the 1047 train, are getting off on this post-Empulse station," QA director Igor Krinitskiy wrote at the time. "It has been an interesting ride, bumpy at times, narrowly avoiding derailment and with everyone working hard to keep that 1047 train going." More recent messages also point to multiple cuts across the studio. UI engineer Iannis Stefan Palaczkos wrote that "the studio has been sadly hit by another wave of layoffs , and I got caught in that wave," while concept artist Jonathan Kuo said separately that "as of the end of this week, it will be my last day at 1047 Games due to the third wave of studio layoffs ." 1047 Games found fast success several years ago with Splitgate: Arena Warfare, a 'Halo with portals' mashup that was an immediate …

title: الهلال ينفق والنصر يغرق.. ماذا يحدث في الدوري السعودي؟
summary: تباين شديد بين قطبي الرياض في الميركاتو الصيفي.. فما السبب؟
body: تباين شديد بين قطبي الرياض في الميركاتو الصيفي.. فما السبب؟ حالة شديدة من التباين يعيشها قطبا العاصمة السعودية الرياض؛ الهلال والنصر، مع بداية فترة الانتقالات الصيفية، قبل بداية الموسم الكروي الجديد 2026-2027. وتنطلق فترة الانتقالات الصيفية في الدوري السعودي، مع بداية يوم 22 يوليو/تموز الجاري، على أن تستمر حتى يوم 6 سبتمبر/أيلول المقبل. النصر بلا صفقات صحيح أن الميركاتو الصيفي لم يبدأ بعد، غير أن العديد من أندية دوري روشن قطعت شوطًا كبيرًا في الصفقات، على عكس النصر. النصر سيكون واحدًا من أندية قليلة ستدخل الميركاتو الصيفي دون أن تكون قد أبرمت أي صفقة، وذلك بسبب الأزمة المالية التي يعاني منها. هذه الأزمة تحرمه حتى الآن من التعاقد مع لاعب بديل للكرواتي مارسيلو بروزوفيتش، والذي رحل بشكل رسمي عقب نهاية عقده بانتهاء الموسم الماضي. وحاول "العالمي" التعاقد مع البرتغالي سامو كوستا، لاعب وسط ريال مايوركا، بناءً على طلب مدربه الأسترالي أنجي بوستيكوجلو، وبحسب صحيفة "الشرق الأوسط" السعودية، فإن الصفقة ستكلفه 9 ملايين يورو فقط. ومع ذلك، فإن النصر لم يحصل حتى الآن على الموافقة اللازمة لإتمام الصفقة، في ظل الرقابة المالية المشددة على تعاقدات النادي، وضرورة اعتماد الميزانية المخصصة للصفقة قبل منح اللجنة التنفيذية صلاحية إتمام المفاوضات. الهلال وصفقة تاريخية في المقابل، يعيش الهلال ميركاتو تاريخيً…

title: مانشستر يونايتد يسبق عمالقة البريميرليج لضم نجم فرنسا المونديالي
summary: منافسة شرسة بين أندية الدوري الإنجليزي
body: منافسة شرسة بين أندية الدوري الإنجليزي اتخذ مانشستر يونايتد الخطوة الأولى في سعيه للفوز بسباق التعاقد مع الفرنسي مانو كونيه، لاعب خط وسط روما، علمًا بأنه يتواجد أيضًا على رادار آرسنال. وبحسب صحيفة " ميرور " الإنجليزية، قام مانشستر يونايتد بالخطوة الأولى، وبدأ محادثات رسمية مع روما بشأن لاعب خط الوسط الفرنسي مانو كونيه، الذي تبلغ قيمته 60 مليون يورو (51 مليون جنيه إسترليني). يواجه مانشستر يونايتد منافسة من آرسنال وليفربول ، للظفر بالنجم الفرنسي الذي ظهر بأداء متميز مع كتيبة الديوك في مونديال 2026. وأثبت لاعب خط الوسط أنه نجمٌ لامع في كأس العالم، ما دفع العديد من الأندية إلى التأهب لضمه خلال فترة الانتقالات الصيفية. رغم تأهل روما لدوري أبطال أوروبا، إلا أنه لا يزال بحاجة إلى بيع بعض لاعبيه، وكان كونيه المرشح الأبرز لجلب مبلغ كبير، إذ ساهمت عروضه المميزة بالمونديال في ارتفاع سعره. كما اعتقد البعض في إيطاليا أن تراجع مانشستر يونايتد عن صفقة إيدرسون لاعب أتالانتا كان بسبب تحديدهم هدفًا جديدًا. أولى مانشستر يونايتد اهتمامًا كبيرًا بتعزيز خط وسطه هذا الصيف، ورغم انضمام يوري تيليمانس وأندريه سانتوس، إلا أنهم ما زالوا يسعون لضم لاعبين مميزين آخرين إلى وسط الملعب، وقد كلّفهم هذان اللاعبان 85 مليون جنيه إسترليني، لكن يبدو أنهم مستعدون لإنفاق المزيد.

body: 3 دول تخوض سباق تنظيم الكان.. فهل ينضم أسود التيرانجا؟ أعلن اتحاد كرة القدم في النيجر رسميًا تقدم بوركينا فاسو ومالي والنيجر بملف مشترك لاستضافة نهائيات كأس أمم أفريقيا 2032، ليصبح هذا الثلاثي أول مرشح معلن بشكل رسمي لتنظيم النسخة القارية بعد 6 سنوات. وأكد الاتحاد النيجري لكرة القدم، في بيان رسمي، أن نظيره الأفريقي اعتمد بشكل نهائي طلب إبداء الاهتمام المقدم من الدول الثلاث، وذلك استجابة للدعوة التي أطلقها "كاف" بداية شهر يوليو لاستقبال ملفات الراغبين في تنظيم نسخ كأس أمم أفريقيا أعوام 2028 و2032 و2036. وجاء في بيان الاتحاد النيجري "يُعلم الاتحاد النيجري لكرة القدم الرأي العام الوطني وأسرة كرة القدم بأن الاتحاد الأفريقي لكرة القدم أكد رسميًا أن إعلان اهتمام بوركينا فاسو ومالي والنيجر بتنظيم كأس أمم أفريقيا 2032 أصبح معتمدًا". title: ماك أليستر يرد على الشامتين بعد خسارة نهائي كأس العالم
summary: نجم الأرجنتين يكسر صمته بعد النهائي
body: نجم الأرجنتين يكسر صمته بعد النهائي مع مرور الوقت، واصل لاعبو المنتخب الأرجنتيني نشر رسائلهم عبر منصات التواصل الاجتماعي للتعبير عن مشاعرهم عقب خسارة نهائي كأس العالم أمام إسبانيا. وكان من بينهم ألكسيس ماك أليستر، الذي وجّه عبر منشور مطول رسالة امتنان للجماهير، إلى جانب رد حاسم على الشامتين. واستهل لاعب الوسط الأرجنتيني كلماته بالحديث عن مرارة الهزيمة قائلًا عبر حسابه على انستجرام: "كنا قريبين للغاية.. ولهذا السبب يبدو الألم مضاعفًا. لكن أحدًا لن يستطيع تجريدنا مما عشناه خلال هذه البطولة؛ فما جعلتمونا نشعر به لم يكن أمرًا عاديًا. لقد عانينا وواجهنا الصعاب، لكننا تجاوزناها معًا. أرجوكم ألا ننسى هذا أبدًا: نحن معًا أقوى من أي أحد". وأكد ماك أليستر أن هناك لحظات ستظل محفورة في ذاكرته وقلبه للأبد، مضيفًا: "مثلما لن أنسى أبدًا ذلك اليوم من عام 2022 حين سرنا وبكينا واحتفلنا بميداليات كأس العالم مع شعبنا في شوارع بوينس آيرس، فإن هذه البطولة تركت لدينا أيضًا مشهدين لا يمحوان ، يعكسان ارتباط الشعب بهذا الفريق ويضمدان جراح كل أرجنتيني". وعن المشهد الأول، أوضح قائلًا: "كان ذلك عندما انفجرت الجماهير الأرجنتينية في المدرجات باحتفالات جنونية فور استلامنا ميداليات المركز الثاني، حيث جعل حضور العائلات والأصدقاء والمشجعين أي احتفال آخر يبدو باهتًا بجهودهم". أما المشهد الثاني فكان الاستقبال في بوين…

title: خارج المستطيل الأخضر.. الأهلي يدعم يايسله بـ4 صفقات دفعة واحدة
summary: تدعيمات قوية للمدرب الألماني قبل الموسم الجديد
body: تدعيمات قوية للمدرب الألماني قبل الموسم الجديد قرر نادي الأهلي السعودي دعم مدربه الألماني ماتياس يايسله بـ4 صفقات دفعة واحدة، ولكن خارج حدود المستطيل الأخضر. ويسعى الأهلي لاستكمال مسيرة النجاح في الموسم المقبل، بعدما حقق إنجازًا استثنائيًا بالتتويج ببطولة دوري أبطال آسيا للنخبة لموسمين متتاليين. من أجل ذلك، أعلن الأهلي، اليوم الثلاثاء، تعاقده مع 4 متخصصين في الطب الرياضي، العلاج الطبيعي، علوم الرياضة، والإعداد البدني، من أجل الارتقاء بجودة الأداء ورعاية اللاعبين. وأوضح الأهلي في بيان عبر موقعه الرسمي أن الكفاءات ضمت الطبيب الإسباني سيمون بوينو لوبيز، حيث ينضم إلى الجهاز الطبي للنادي، بعد مسيرة طويلة مع نادي فياريال الإسباني. كما ضمت القائمة أخصائي العلاج الطبيعي الهولندي جيسبر جابرييلز، بعدما عمل في نادي فيتيسه الهولندي، والقادسية السعودي، بالإضافة إلى برنامج صقور المستقبل التابع للاتحاد السعودي لكرة القدم. الأهلي تعاقد أيضًا مع لوك جارسيا، المتخصص في علوم الرياضة والإعداد البدني، بعدما عمل مع أندية لوس أنجلوس جالاكسي الأمريكي، تورونتو الكندي، بالإضافة إلى بنفيكا البرتغالي. آخر الأسماء كان المعد البدني النمساوي سيباستيان كيرشنر، والذي عمل مع نادي ريد بول سالزبورج النمساوي من 2019، بالإضافة لعمله مع نادي ليفيرينج وأكاديمية ريد بول سالزبورج ومركز التدريب الأولمبي في سالزبورج. يُذكر …

title: بالفيديو.. نور الدين زكري يفجرها: أنا أفضل مدرب جزائري.. ومَن هؤلاء ليقودوا المنتخب؟
summary: مجرد ذكر هؤلاء شتيمة للجزائر.. تصريحات قوية من مدرب الشباب السعودي السابق
body: مجرد ذكر هؤلاء شتيمة للجزائر.. تصريحات قوية من مدرب الشباب السعودي السابق أشعل نور الدين زكري، مدرب الشباب السعودي السابق، الجدل حول هوية المدير الفني المقبل للمنتخب الجزائري، بعدما اعتبر نفسه أفضل مدرب جزائري في الوقت الحالي، مؤكدًا أن سيرته الذاتية وشهاداته التدريبية لا يملكها أي مدرب محلي آخر. يأتي ذلك في ظل استمرار الغموض بشأن مستقبل السويسري فلاديمير بيتكوفيتش على رأس الجهاز الفني لـ"محاربي الصحراء". ولا يزال مستقبل بيتكوفيتش مع المنتخب الجزائري غير محسوم، رغم توصية اللجنة الفنية للاتحاد الجزائري لكرة القدم باستمراره في منصبه، بعد الإخفاق في كأس العالم 2026، والمطالبات بتغيير الجهاز الفني. وكان بيتكوفيتش جدد عقده قبل المونديال ليستمر حتى عام 2028، إلا أن مستقبله أصبح محل نقاش داخل أروقة الاتحاد الجزائري، مع وجود توجه سابق نحو إمكانية تعيين مدرب جزائري لخلافته. وقال زكري، في تصريحات لقناة الشروق نيوز الجزائرية، "أنا حاليًا أفضل مدرب جزائري، وليس مجرد مدرب محلي، لأن كل شهاداتي إيطالية ومعترف بها دوليًا. لا يوجد أي مدرب في الجزائر يملك سيرة ذاتية أو شهادات مثل التي أملكها". وأضاف المدرب البالغ من العمر 61 عامًا "خلال 26 عامًا من مسيرتي، كلما توليت تدريب فريق تمكنت من تحقيق الأهداف المطلوبة مني. ماذا تريدون أكثر من ذلك؟". ويستند زكري إلى مسيرة طويلة قاد خلالها عدة أندية داخل الجز…

title: A modder has brought No Man's Sky-style seamless takeoffs to Starfield, and even in beta they look pretty great
summary: Going up.
body: One of Starfield's big problems is that its core fantasy runs contrary to the tech it's built on. Bethesda's space RPG is meant to evoke the majesty and scale of the cosmos. It's about exploration, curiosity, and wonder. And yet, it exists in an engine that necessitates a whole lot of loading screens, and so the final frontier feels like a series of small rooms. In particular, the game's takeoff and landing sequences drew criticism for shoving in loading screens where games like No Man's Sky had seamless transitions. Well, no more! Sort of! A modder named 0xBobby is hard at work to rid Starfield's takeoff sequences of the loading screen scourge. Seamless Planet Takeoffs is a mod for Starfield that makes departing its planets an at least somewhat immersive experience. Rather than cutting to a third-person view of your ship as it jets away, you remain in the cockpit, watching the planet's atmosphere give way to the void as you ascend. It's not perfect, which is probably why it's in beta. It's not removing the loads so much as it is masking them, which means that you can still kind of identify the point at which the game shunts you from one cell to another. 0xBobby writes that "the s…

title: A hacker has reportedly wiped out parts of the land registry database of Romania, bringing its real-estate market to a shuddering halt
summary: Backups are said to be on the way.
body: A hacker going by the name of ByteToBreach has broken in to Romania's cadastre, or land registry, and reportedly wiped information from its databases. Sources speaking to Risky Business have told the outlet that the hacker entered the system using valid credentials, exfiltrated the data within, and later wiped info from its servers after a failed extortion attempt. ByteToBreach is reported to be the same hacker that breached the Swedish government's e-portal earlier this year, among other alleged acts of hackery. The stolen data was said to be announced for sale on two forums. In the meantime, the country's real-estate market appears to have been heavily disrupted . Romanian news outlet Jurnalul De Arges reports a post originating from notary Ana Stan that reads: "I am a notary. Since Tuesday I cannot issue a land registry extract, I cannot authenticate a sale, I cannot register a mortgage." While citizens and notaries are unable to obtain proof of ownership, new real-estate transactions have been brought to a shuddering halt. The disruption also falls mere weeks before the government's plans to raise the VAT on new homes to 21% from 9% come into effect, which means those hoping t…

title: It's probably time to update 7-Zip as the app has just been patched to fix a pretty big vulnerability
summary: It will need to be manually updated to version 26.02 or later.
body: If you use 7-Zip for your file compression and decompression you might want to update, as there's been a pretty big vulnerability patched. And yes, I mean manually update, as 7-Zip doesn't auto-update. You can download and run a new installer from the 7-Zip website . If you're updated to version 26.02 (or later, if you're reading this in the future) then you'll be fine. To check this, go to Help > About 7-Zip in the app. The vulnerability, as explained by Zero Day Initiative (via TechSpot ), "allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of 7-Zip. User interaction is required to exploit this vulnerability in that the target must visit a malicious page or open a malicious file. "The specific flaw exists within the processing of XZ chunked data. Crafted XZ-compressed data can trigger an overflow of a heap-based buffer. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the current process." It sounds like you'd have to try to use a compromised compressed file in 7-Zip for the exploit to work. This might initially sound like a bit of a nothing burger because compromised files can obviously compromise your PC (duh). But I'd say …

title: TSMC admits it's 'jealous' of memory chipmakers' margins, but is limiting its own price hike because its customers would not survive price increases of 'four to five times'
summary: The company announces a 10 - 15% price increase, but isn't keen to emulate the memory industry's runaway pricing.
body: You can be sure that whatever TSMC does next, the rest of the industry will follow. Unfortunately, it looks like this major player in chip manufacturing is set to raise its prices by as much as 10% in 2027. This is due to both the rising cost of materials as well as the company's overseas fab construction projects (such as the already booked up though not even built yet 2nm fab in Arizona ). Price increases ranging between 5 to 10% will affect various chip production services offered by TSMC (via Nikkei Asia ). Sources also claim that extra orders of high-performance computing chips not otherwise accounted for in customers' original forecasts will incur a 10 to 15% premium on top. The services affected include TSMC's 7nm and more advanced fabrication processes. As TSMC accounts for over 70% of the global semiconductor foundry market , Big Tech will have little choice but to pay the bill when it's due. Waiting until the start of 2027 to raise its prices is considered a less aggressive move within the industry (especially in light of memory prices being predicted to rise by as much as 50% in Q3 of 2026). Indeed, we've already seen more than our fair share of price increases this yea…

title: Arctic Freezer 36-S review
summary: Surprisingly effective for the money.
body: The Arctic Freezer 36-S lands at the right time. Prices are rising for PC builds but you can claw some money back with this cooler. It costs just $22 / £19 . A small price to pay for ample cooling for your processor. And it is, genuinely, good. Arctic has plenty of accolades to its name when it comes to cooling. One of its more popular designs, the Arctic Freezer 36 , is our pick for the best budget air cooler . With two fans, an effective heatsink design, and a great price tag, it's all anyone needs to chill most of today's popular gaming chips. But could you make do with less? That's what the Freezer 36-S puts to the test. A few cuts have been made to the Freezer 36-S compared to the Freezer 36, including trimming down to just one fan. But it still has a lot going for it, especially when it comes to performance, as you can see in the charts below . The Freezer 36-S performs really well considering its size and price tag. Though price is a sticking point: the Freezer 36-S is going up against the best and when you can get the Freezer 36 for very nearly the same cost, it's tough to argue for the slightly cheaper model. title: Acer's Predator Atlas 8 pricing puts the nail in the handheld coffin for me: it is now a luxury market
summary: Just as predicted.
body: A couple of months ago, Intel announced a couple of new chips for handheld gaming PCs, the Intel Arc G3 and G3 Extreme. It was certainly exciting to have something new on that front, given we've been seeing mostly the same silicon crammed inside such devices for a very long time. But at the time I warned that signs pointed towards yet more prohibitively expensive price tags . And now we're seeing Acer's pricing for its new Predator Atlas 8 handhelds, it's safe to say I was unfortunately right. As spotted by KitGuru and confirmed by yours truly , the UK pricing for these handhelds, containing new Intel Panther Lake chips and expected to launch in October this year, ranges from £1,000 to £1,500. The cheapest has a regular G3 chip, 16 GB of memory, and a 512 GB SSD. You can up the memory to 24 GB for another £100. A G3 Extreme version with a 1 TB SSD and 24 GB of memory will be able to be nabbed for £1,300, and bumping that up to 32 GB of RAM will get you up to the top £1,500 price tag. Converting those figures to dollars, that makes for a handheld that ranges from (roughly) $1,300 to $2,000. Though of course prices don't usually track exchange rates exactly. Yep, that's pretty expen…

title: Developer of Burnout spiritual successor Wreckreation has formed a new studio working on a sequel
summary: "We've reached a point where it makes sense for the project to have a new home, one that we own completely."
body: To this day, the now-stagnant Burnout series is still the prime example of an arcade racer that every other contemporary is compared to. Naturally, it's spurred on a bunch of imitators and spiritual successors over the years, especially after the decline of Criterion Games into a support studio at EA. Nowadays, instead of pioneering racing games, it's a "Battlefield Studio" . One such spiritual successor was 2025's Wreckreation, created by Three Fields Entertainment, a small team of veterans, including from Criterion Games, making games since 1999. Unfortunately, Wreckreaction launched to mixed reviews, not quite reaching the heights of its inspiration. But it's not the end of the team or the series. "We've made a double announcement today," the developer's latest statement on Patreon reads. "We're making a sequel to Wreckreation … It's built around aggression, pressure, risk, and of course consequence." "Over the last six months we've been talking directly to players about what they want from a modern arcade driving game, and Wreckreation 2 is the result of those conversations," said studio head Fiona Sperry. title: Valve has replaced a Steam Machine for free after it was stolen by porch pirates, saving one UK redditor roughly £1,000
summary: A feel-good story? What year is this again?
body: The Steam Machine is a pricey piece of hardware. Which is why UK redditor mdumtshali must have been heartbroken (or very annoyed) when theirs was stolen from their doorstep after the Royal Mail dropped it off while they were at work. The delivery driver sent a picture of the Steam Machine box to prove it had been delivered, and even tried to cover it with a plastic bag (via Notebookcheck ). But alas, when mdumtshali returned home, porch pirates (my new favourite term) had already absconded with the ill-fated mini PC. However, mdumtshali says they eventually contacted Steam Support, which duly agreed to send out a replacement Steam Machine free of charge. "Honestly, kudos to Steam Support," says the redditor. "[I] thought I was going to be out £1000, which I really can't afford." Steam Support initially asked mdumtshali to check with neighbours to see if the parcel had been taken in, which they duly did to no avail. As the Steam Machine is a high-value item, it's surprising that a signature wasn't required by the Royal Mail for delivery confirmation, which would have likely prevented this whole fiasco in the first place. title: Ex-TSMC manager first to be indicted under National Security Act for allegedly attempting to leak core Taiwanese chipmaking technologies to China
summary: They could face up to seven years in prison.
body: Taiwanese prosecutors have reportedly indicted a former TSMC manager for allegedly stealing trade secrets to give to China. This case, according to a spokesperson from Taiwan's High Prosecutors Office who relayed the information to Nikkei Asia , is the first of its kind: "Although the attempt to transfer the technology to China was unsuccessful, the case remains highly significant as the first prosecution under the National Security Act involving an alleged attempt to leak Taiwan's national core technologies to China." The plan was, says Nikkei Asia, "to establish a semiconductor materials analysis company in China called CSMAC." Apparently, the prosecutors discovered that Chen, a former TSMC deputy manager, worked with another Hong Kong man to steal TSMC trade secrets, copying 21 confidential documents, taking them home to study for use in China. The prosecutors also claim that Chen was considering recruiting more talent from Taiwan for CSMAC. Chen has been detained for the past couple of months, and could face up to seven years in prison. title: Activision should ditch the Call of Duty movie and bring back its absurd celeb fest where Will Arnett went on a quest to find his own junk
summary: Ridley Scott, Will Arnett, Jason Bateman, and Andrew Santino all made Call of Duty shows before.
body: With the news that Call of Duty , of all things, is getting adapted into a movie by the director of Battleship —and it's unfortunately set in the Modern Warfare universe —I got vivid flashbacks to the series' last attempt in multimedia. Back in 2011, Activision decided it was time to change how it would support Call of Duty games post-launch. Modern Warfare 3 (the first one) saw the introduction of Call of Duty Elite, a subscription service that included monthly content like new maps, as well as social network tools. While there was a free, lite version which included things like Theater Mode and career stats, the real deal cost $50 a year. Of course, the monthly DLC (later sold as separate packs for non-subscribers) was the reason most people, myself included, ever joined up. But Activision was really pushing for it to be a social network-inspired multimedia platform, so it sweetened the deal with three video series, one by Ridley and Tony Scott, another by Will Arnett and Jason Bateman, and one from Andrew Santino. title: Redditor uses 'ticking time bomb' vial of gallium to stop their GPU sagging
summary: 'It was the only thing I found that had almost the perfect height.'
body: Behold, Anti-sag temperature indicator and ticking time bomb from r/pcmasterrace For a nervy PC Gamer such as myself, cracking open your gaming rig for even a spot of light dust busting can feel like you're flirting with danger. Well, one Redditor has decided to laugh in the face of danger by using a tube of gallium to stop their GPU from sagging. Philip_777 shared their unusual anti-sagging intervention, describing it as both a " temperature indicator and ticking time bomb ." For those a little unclear on why this is such a bad idea, allow me to share some of my recent education on the subject. Gallium has a super low melting point, meaning that it will revert to liquid form if you attempt to hold it in the palm of your hand. Apparently, gallium can also 'eat' other metals, like aluminium. In other words, a gallium leak inside of your PC would be a very bad, no good time. Philip_777 has taken some precautions by confining the gallium in what I'm hoping is a sturdy plastic vial. They write in a follow up comment, "It shouldn't become brittle or anything. I think it was HDPE [High-density polyethylene]. Still one of those moments where you know it's safe, but there's still a chance…

title: I'm very into this Papers, Please-esque puzzle game about identifying traitors to the socialist motherland
summary: Hey, it's a living.
body: Citizens! We live in times of unprecedented danger! We are beset on all sides by traitors and saboteurs. Reactionaries whisper treason in dimly lit rooms. Their mouths spew poison and lies that eat away at the foundations of the worker-peasant revolution, at the root of the world revolution itself. And, worst of all, no one gave me a desk big enough to deal with it. (Image credit: JKBC) What Awaits, Aleksey? is a clever mystery/puzzle game that caters to all my specific obsessions. It's a Stasi simulator, more or less—you are Aleksey Lutomski, a recent hire at the security service of a fictional 20th-century communist state, tasked with identifying the members of an underground cell of dissidents who are going around saying mean things about the motherland. For the most part, this means obsessing over the tidiness of your desk. It is no longer World War 2 and you are not Stierlitz . You are not kicking in doors and taking down fascist spies with a Tokarev. It is 1970: the socialist sixth of the Earth has settled into bleary stagnation. title: Glorious GHS InfinitePlay review
summary: This versatile set of cans impresses with its hot swappable battery system, but it's just okay otherwise.
body: Glorious, purveyor of PC peripherals such as gaming keyboards and mice, has branched out into headsets. The company released its first wired effort, the Glorious GHS Eternal , earlier this year and, in terms of build quality, the wireless InfinitePlay shares a lot of DNA. In terms of pricing though, the two headsets couldn't be more different. The swappable battery system goes some way to justify the significant jump in price. As someone who loves wireless headsets, but doesn't love how often they have to become tethered to my PC to charge, this proved a real game-changer. The InfinitePlay is also designed to be a versatile bit of kit you can take everywhere. Whether you're listening to tunes on the go, or counting the shots in one of the best FPS games , the InfinitePlay's balanced sound profile is tuned to handle both scenarios equally well. EQ tweaking is offered via the straightforward to use Glorious Core software, with more in-depth options planned for a future update. That versatility is backed up by great connectivity. title: Nvidia finally reveals what controls devs actually have for DLSS 5, and don't worry folks, there are TWO main sliders to control the AI filter
summary: The company is, however, 'building more' controls.
body: Nvidia announced DLSS 5 back in March and it received, let's say, mixed reactions . A lot of people weren't happy about how, judging by the demos , it seemed to essentially just slap a 'yassifying' AI filter on top of a game scene. Nvidia itself confirmed that all the tech has to work with for each AI frame is a traditional 2D frame and motion vectors, essentially confirming the "filter" idea. Now, at SIGGRAPH 2026, the company has explained that developers will get two main sliders to control DLSS 5's intensity. My initial reaction was probably the same as yours: two whole sliders, whoop-de-doo. It's hardly a massive improvement from the one on-to-off masking slider we previously thought devs would have access to. But let's take a look at what they're actually controlling and how it works before we jump to conclusions. The two sliders are for 'structural intensity' and 'tone intensity'. Despite what the word "structure" might seem to imply, Nvidia is keen to point out that "it is not changing the geometry in any way, and it is uplifting the image." The structural intensity slider in fact is "modulating the high-frequency detail of the frame." This includes things such as ambient …

title: Developer creates a password-cracking Game Boy Advance that is 'about thirty million times slower than a modern cracking rig'
summary: Why? Why not?
body: A security engineer has "ported" one of the best known password recovery utilities to the GameBoy Advance. The port is based on Hashcat, a password recovery utility that otherwise pitches itself as the "world's fastest." But I'm doing the bunny ears around 'ported' because even the developer admits this is "not really" Hashcat in full. It turns out the 21-year-old Nintendo handheld console is also not really the best hardware for cracking passwords. "The monstrously powerful 16.78 MHz ARM7TDMI chip does an astronomical 727 SHA256 hashes per second!! Which is about thirty million times slower than a modern cracking rig," Project developer Mark El-Khoury jokes on LinkedIn , "350 days of continuous cracking on this bad boy could be done in about 1 second with a modern GPU-accelerated cracking rig." Even with its snail's pace, I can't help but dream up a heist movie where the would-be thieves only use repurposed gaming hardware like this to crack open password-protected vaults. I can just picture the scene now: 'How much longer is this gonna take?' 'Uh, well, you may want to pitch up a tent…?' Riveting. The engineer built GBA-Hashcat in the Butano engine , which allows developers to c…

title: A new Elder Scrolls is still years away, but this fun Arthurian take on the formula is 50% off right now
summary: Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon is a very competent Bethesda RPG, not made by Bethesda.
body: It's a little surprising there aren't more The Elder Scrolls clones. Aside from Avowed, the only other example I can think of is Tainted Grail: The Fall of Avalon. It launched in May last year after a stint in early access, and the response was positive, perhaps surprisingly so, considering how tough it must be for a relatively young studio to make a game of this scale. Our reviewer wrote that it "puts an interesting spin on Arthurian legend and presents a competent world that plays like a love letter to the open-world first-person RPG genre." It's a "dark reimagination" of Arthurian legends, set entirely on the island of Avalon. There are three distinct zones to explore—in this sense, it wends closer to Avowed—and it has all the usual distractions: you can fish, farm, cook, mine, smith weapons, mix spells, and sketch in your journal, between the usual bouts of dungeon crawling, overworld exploration, and "morally ambiguous" choice making. I've played a couple of hours on Steam Deck and it runs pretty well there too, albeit at around the 30-45fps mark. The art style is darker than Skyrim's, coming off almost as a hybrid of Dark Souls and Morrowind. It feels unmistakably like a fir…

"It’s been a while Ghosts!" the announcement excitedly states. My initial impression was that this is basically a scaled-down version of last week's big Bethesda blowout : A blast of the hype machine intended, at least in part, to help you forget about all the bad stuff going on, specifically the sweeping layoffs at Xbox that are putting thousands of people out of work. title: There's a dinosaur soulslike launching on Steam this week where you're a spinosaurus swinging a greatsword with your mouth who just might be able to parry the meteor
summary: Just in case that's of interest to you.
body: It's taken centuries of human advancement, but soulslikes and demanding third-person action games have finally reached a level of cultural proliferation where we as a society can ask the all important question: What if the dinosaurs could have simply parried the meteor? That's the tantalizing possibility suggested by Dinoblade, a probably paleontologically accurate soulslike launching on Steam later this week that portrays dinosaurs just as the fossil record tells us they lived: As big lizards getting into sick as hell swordfights by swinging around weapons they're holding in their teeth. "Step into the role of a young Spinosaurus, wielding a colossal Great Sword forged from ancient power," says developer Team Spino in Dinoblade's store description. "Confront rival dinosaurs, some armed with brutal weapons of their own, all in a desperate fight to prevent a looming extinction." The latest Dinoblade trailer is like a highlight reel of all the coolest things we would have daydreamed about as dinosaur-obsessed youths before society taught us how to be ashamed of imagination: There are tyrannosaurs with battleaxes. There are tyrannosaurs with halberds. There are tyrannosaurs biting do…

title: Jennifer English, star of Baldur's Gate 3 and Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, leaves Tides of Annihilation lead role
summary: English, who won a BAFTA award for her work on Clair Obscur in 2026, says the decision was difficult but "personally necessary."
body: Jennifer English, who gained fame for her portrayal of Shadowheart in Baldur's Gate 3 and then won a BAFTA award for best performer in a leading role for Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, has announced that she is withdrawing from the role of Gwendolyn in the upcoming Tides of Annihilation in order to "properly look after [her] mental and physical health." Revealed in 2025, Tides of Annihilation struck me as an Arthurian Elden Ring set in modern-day London : Gwendolyn, the only survivor of the "Outworld invasion" that's shattered London, can summon the spirits of the Knights of the Round Table to help her do battle with the "demi-gods of Avalon." As videogames go, I'd say it sure looks very videogame-y . No points for originality there, but it's among the 50 most wishlisted games on Steam , and that's not nothing. But the game suffered a blow when developer Eclipse Glow Games announced that English was stepping down. "Earlier in June, Jennifer informed us that she would no longer be able to continue in the role," the studio wrote on X . "While we were, of course, saddened by her decision, we completely understood and respected Jennifer in prioritizing her well-being. We are also deeply…

title: FBI arrests 21-year-old who allegedly stole $200,000 with malware-infected Steam games and spent the money on traceable UberEats gift cards
summary: Alleged cybercriminals have to eat, too.
body: The FBI has arrested a 21-year-old Florida resident, identified as Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins, for allegedly distributing malware embedded in a series of Steam games to approximately 8,000 PCs. Arrested last week, Wilkins—alongside two unnamed co-conspirators—is accused of using the private information stolen from those infected computers to steal over $200,000 in cryptocurrency. According to a criminal complaint filed by the FBI (via Techspot ), Wilkins and his associates encouraged social media users to download their malware-laden games on Discord, Telegram, X, and LinkedIn, while also employing chatbots to identify and prioritize "individuals with large cryptocurrency holdings." (Image credit: Future) The FBI doesn't name Steam in the document, but refers to the weaponized games as being "available for download on a popular digital distribution software company for videogames located in the Western District of Washington," and the games it says were used for distributing malware—Dashverse (2024), Lunara (2024), PirateFi (2025), Blockblasters (2025), and Lampy (2026)—had all been previously named in its March 2026 call for information from users who had downloaded mali…

body: Steam's Train Fest has begun, meaning there are deals and discounts on lots of locomotive games, even a few brand new ones like Denshattack , which just came out this month. But when it comes to train sales there's really only one train game to talk about: Train Simulator Classic, a sim notable for having a whole heck of a lot of DLC: a whopping 790 pieces of it. And almost all of them are on sale this week. The base game itself has a hefty discount of 80% off , making it a steal at only $6 during Train Fest. And just about all of that tasty DLC is also on sale for anywhere between 20-80% off as well. I won't lie, it was trickier than I expected to figure out what the total discount on all that DLC adds up to. Perhaps for obvious reasons, Steam won't let me add all 790 pieces of DLC to my cart at once, but it also won't just display all of the pieces of DLC in a nice tallyable column, truncating the list to a mere 200 entries. Even the ever-useful Augmented Steam extension won't let me fill my cart with every piece of DLC in one fell swoop. Come on, storefronts, let me accidentally purchase thousands of dollars of software! But after a lot of clicking and scrolling and digging and…

title: Modern Warfare 4 beta dates set for August, and this year Game Pass subscribers get no special treatment
summary: Pre-order players get five extra days of playtime.
body: It's that time of year again: The next Call of Duty is on deck, and Activision's got the beta dates to prove it. Modern Warfare 4 won't hit the streets until late October, but the multiplayer beta begins a full two months ahead of time. As usual, Activision is holding two beta weekends: One for those who pre-order the game and one for everyone else. Weekend 1 (August 21-25): For those who pre-order Modern Warfare 4 on PC, PS5, or Xbox (no Switch 2 beta) Weekend 2 (August 28 to September 1): A proper public beta on all platforms (including Switch 2) Fairly expected for a CoD beta calendar, except for a few abnormal details, like how Switch 2 players will be left out of that first weekend (that version might be coming in a little hot compared to the others). There's also the fact that pre-order weekend is five days instead of four—further stretching the definition of "weekend." That means pre-order players can start the same day as the Call of Duty Next livestream and won't have to watch streamers enjoy a 24-hour headstart. Less surprising, but surely disappointing for many, is that Game Pass subscribers will not be entitled to early beta access this year. They were for both Black O…

title: 15 years before Dishonored, Thief devs considered letting Garrett shrink himself rat-sized so he could scurry through drains and mouse holes
summary: The idea was ultimately dropped, for good reasons.
body: Of the many remarkable abilities possessed by Dishonored hero Corvo Attano, perhaps the most remarkable is, well, possession: Corvo can possess creatures, most famously the game's plentiful rats, to get up to all sorts of trouble, including accessing locations that would be inaccessible to his full-sized body. As it turns out, this wasn't an entirely original idea. More than a decade earlier it had been considered for use in Dishonored's masterpiece progenitor, Thief: The Dark Project . Thief basically is Dishonored, speaking very broadly: A guy who's good at sneaking around gets caught up in a bunch of political nonsense he'd really rather avoid because of a woman he can't admit to being in love with because it'd be weird . One chief difference is that Garrett, the titular thief of the Thief games (the ones that matter, anyway) doesn't have any powers. He almost did, though. In a 2018 PC Gamer magazine interview marking the 20 th anniversary of Thief's debut, lead designer Tim Stellmach said Looking Glass Studios had pondered giving Garrett the ability to shrink himself and travel through small passageways like drains. The idea was ultimately dropped, though, for eminently practi…

title: Think gaming handhelds are too expensive? Ayaneo says 'hold my beer,' lists $5,000+ monster
summary: How much is too much?
body: Ayaneo said it was suspending pre-orders for its Next 2 gaming handheld earlier this year after rising storage costs and the ongoing memory crisis made it " no longer sustainable ." Well, it's now listed on Ayaneo's website—with an asking price for the top model of $5,299 . I'll wait for you to pick up your jaw. Back with us? Good. The top-end Ayaneo Next 2 comes with an AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 APU, which is a Strix Halo beastie that's damn expensive no matter the device you find it in. Storage wise, you get a 2 TB SSD. Sheesh, I know NAND prices are silly right now, but surely a single NVMe drive can't be entirely to blame. As for the RAM? Well it's... oh. Oh I see. The top spec model comes with, brace yourselves, 128 GB of LPDDR5x-8533 . Yep, that would account for the super-silly price tag. I know the the Next 2 is positioning itself to be the handheld to end all handhelds , but 128 GB of RAM? For what, exactly? It's a Windows-based machine, so I suppose you could get up to some AI-based tomfoolery with it. Other than that, though, I cannot see a world where a 128 GB gaming handheld makes any sense. title: Streamer builds a battery powered PC with over 100 AAs, uses Hannah Montana Linux to benchmark their abomination
summary: The best of both worlds?
body: Streamer Uwos Lab built an entirely battery powered gaming PC over the course of a five-hour stream last week . The rules were simple: no laptops, and no lithium ion AA batteries. The build had to be a desktop that could play a game while only relying on battery power. The self-described 'Mad-scientist streamer' explained their plan simply enough, saying, "We're going to wire eight AA in series to get 12 volts. And then we're going to take 50 of those banks and wire them in parallel to get a high current, 12 volts, feed that into a DC to ATX power supply, and get our desktop online." A bit of quick and dirty maths initially suggested the streamer would need about 400 Alkaline AA batteries to pull this project off, but they ended up only wiring together 192 in total. These were split across three laser-cut wooden boxes. Each one contains 64 batteries, plus all the clips and contact pads needed to transmit power to the desktop, and then is wrapped in duct tape (via Tom's Hardware ). I'd say 'Now, that's mad science,' but we're not quite there yet. As for the PC itself, Uwos Lab didn't say much about its specs. However, we do know its based on an AM4 motherboard, and does not have a …

body: The PC hardware market right now is not a pretty sight, so it's nice to hear one of the companies arguably at least in part responsible acknowledging how bad things are from a customer's perspective. Even if that is taken with the giant pinch of salt considering it's being approached from a business perspective, and discussing the ability for other companies to absorb costs. As The Chosun Daily reports , SK hynix group chairman (ie, head of the board) Chey Tae-won recently admitted to the the press that memory prices are "abnormally high" and said "there are limits to how much prices can be raised". Apparently the company is considering building a factory in the US to help with supply and trade pressures. "Supply must be increased to lower prices, even for the sake of semiconductor companies... Memory prices are currently at an abnormally high level. While AI companies can absorb increased costs through investments, PC and smartphone manufacturers have no choice but to pass semiconductor price hikes onto product prices." "Since most customers for these products are individuals, there are limits to how much prices can be raised. To prevent 'chipflation'—where rising chip prices dri…

title: Turns out Todd Howard is a full-time Reddit lurker just like the rest of us, says we'd 'be surprised how many great ideas' he gets from the site
summary: One of us. One of us.
body: Well, it turns out that Bethesda's executive producer Todd Howard and I have at least two things in common—we're both roughly 5 feet 6 inches tall, and we're both chronic Reddit lurkers. Admittedly, I only have IMDB to go by when it comes to the height thing. Maybe it's wrong! But the Reddit thing is 100% true, because he went ahead and said it himself. Howard gave the folks of r/Games a surprise jumpscare last week, making only his second public comment on the site in the last three years. It was, unsurprisingly, under a post sharing Bethesda essentially vomiting out every single thing it's currently working on , which came shortly after the announcement of parent owner Xbox's catastrophic layoffs . "Hey Reddit. I'm a professional lurker and read your comments all the time. Many here do and we deeply appreciate the passion for our work," Howard wrote. "I know I don't really post, and we're usually very quiet. Today's info was an attempt at changing that and letting everyone know what we've been working on the past several years, and a look at what's coming. So know we're constantly listening and keep telling us how to be even better." Howard then goes on to say: "You'd be surpris…

title: Activision has confirmed the Call of Duty movie setting, and it's not what I'd have picked

body: I'm not sure who thinks we need a Call of Duty movie, but it's officially a thing, and it's coming out on June 30, 2028 . It's " an authentic and exciting experience for longtime fans and newcomers alike ." The big question was whether it will be set in the Modern Warfare or Black Ops universe, or something more unexpected, like WW2, Advanced Warfare, or Infinite Warfare (although probably not that last one). The answer is it's going to be set in the Modern Warfare timeline, revealed with a very short teaser trailer at FanaticsFest over the weekend. With Modern Warfare 4 coming up this October, presumably a Black Ops game next year, and then another Modern Warfare game in 2028, it lines up. title: 'With the power of illustration, we can capture the true, playful vibe of a kangaroo': Google explains the thinking behind its new 3D emojis
body: I like to imagine that, in thousands of years time, an alien species will land on the desert wasteland that was once Earth and begin combing through our digital records. What they'll likely discover fairly quickly is the rise of emojis in our daily communications during the late 2000s , a process Google is looking to push further into the modern age with proper 3D models. The Noto 3D collection of emojis was released earlier this year , but Google has gone into the design process (and a brief history of the form) in-depth in a blog post for World Emoji Day . No, I didn't know that was a thing either. "We don't just 'laugh' anymore," says Google. "We collapse, or internally scream. Modern internet culture has steadily moved from mild expressions to drama, hyperbole and overwhelm." "For years, 'face with tears of joy' (😂) was the undisputed emoji king, according to Gboard Federated Analytics. But following a multi-year decline, it slipped down the charts by 2025," the post continues. "Why? Because 😭 is a masterclass in modern vocabulary: It’s hilarious, it’s devastating and it captures absolute overwhelm." (Image credit: Darnexx on Nexus Mods) Uhh, sure thing. To be fair, 😂 often…

title: Palworld is only growing more powerful, hitting nearly a million concurrents in its second weekend
summary: This is just what happens when you give pokémon guns.
body: Palworld continues to prove that it's more than a flash-in-the-pan novelty. The survival-crafting romp with legally distinct pokémon just had its second weekend since it hit 1.0, following a couple of years in early access, and it's only getting more popular. The second weekend saw concurrents approaching a million on Steam (961,867, to be exact), growing by more than 100,000 players since the previous weekend, which had already been extremely busy. It's an impressive showing for the game's second weekend, though not necessarily all that surprising. After two years in early access, there were probably a lot of folk who'd relegated it to the depths of their Steam library and are only now digging it out again. While it's enjoying a lot of attention right now, the peak of its popularity continues to be the early access launch, which saw more than 2 million players jump into the game. I confess that I do not see the appeal—I saw all I needed to in the first days of early access, and unlike, say, Grounded and its sequel , it proved incapable of overcoming my survival-crafting malaise. Some of my colleagues, however, have been having a grand old time, and as a result they've been able t…

body: Steve Jobs had his turtlenecks, Jensen Huang has his iconic leather jackets. Well, one less of them now, anyway. Famous auctioneer Sotheby's put one of Huang's jackets up for auction over the weekend, with estimates placing the value between $40,000 to $60,000. However, the hammer price (after 65 bids) ended up being an astonishing $960,000—with the proceeds going towards young people's futures (via Tom's Hardware ). The auction was organized by Long Journey Ventures to benefit the Edge Institute , a non-profit that "convenes people working at the frontiers of tech, science, culture, and society in popup villages to live together and experiment towards a brighter future." "The proceeds will fund fellowships, grants, and residencies for the next generation of young builders to pursue their passions and projects, supporting them to find their higher purpose," says the Sotheby's page. But blimey, stone the crows etc, that's a lot of money for a leather jacket. Particularly as it's a Tom Ford model that usually retails for much less. title: Final Fantasy 14's attempt to take the MMO mobile is over before the world even gets the chance to see it
summary: A Realm Re-gone.
body: You might be surprised to hear that the critically acclaimed MMORPG Final Fantasy 14—I'll spare you the free trial copypasta—has a mobile version. Well, it does… though er, not for much longer. A little over a year after launching in China, Final Fantasy 14 mobile is shutting down and taking its unreleased global version down with it. The mobile MMO was originally announced in November 2024 , with Square Enix handing the reins to PUBG Mobile developer LightSpeed Studios. It wasn't a straight port of what we've been playing on our PCs for the last decade, mind. For starters, the story only included base A Realm Reborn—that's everything up to the end of 2.0 with The Ultimate Weapon. Quests, systems, and jobs had also been nipped and tucked for a more streamlined and mobile-friendly experience, as well as a handful of features from later expansions folded in. It was essentially a strange stitched-together version, but one that also came with cosmetics and quality-of-life features that had longtime FF14 players (myself included) longing for their introduction into the main game. title: My sluggish limbs mean I'm terrible at Black Myth: Wukong on both a controller, as well as mouse and keyboard—so surely a brain-computer interface is the answer
summary: Thinking 'Get good' and making it so?
body: Translating brain activity into game inputs is the stuff of absurdly long-running sci-fi anime. It's also a tech that, though very much in its infancy, now exists in the real world too. For instance, attendees at this year's World Artificial Intelligence Conference in Shanghai could have a go at playing Black Myth: Wukong with just their brain waves. AI enthusiast Huang Lu shared a video of the non-invasive brain-computer interface at WAIC 2026 via X . According to the exhibit's staff, it only takes about five minutes to calibrate for each gamer. A WAIC press release describing the exhibit explains, "The non-invasive system captures and decodes neural signals, then converts the user's intentions into device commands. Related technology is also being used in sleep-related applications, early warning for epileptic seizures, and anesthesia monitoring." The setup here is a bit different to similar brain-computer interfaces I've seen. Namely, it doesn't require the user to think of very specific stimulus in order to activate different regions of the brain, a la streamer PerriKaryal's EmotivBCI setup .
